notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling singles on a ground ball to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Wenceel Pérez scores. Matt Vierling to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Mike Yastrzemski.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Matt Vierling scores. Hao-Yu Lee out at home on the throw, left fielder Mike Yastrzemski to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to catcher Drake Baldwin.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
